vix.note: Finnhub returned 0 for VIX; verified via CBOE/MarketWatch web search. VIX 18.63 is in normal-elevated boundary (15-20).

gainers.catalyst: Homebuilder sector rally amid lower mortgage rate expectations and rotation into real assets; new home sales data (580K vs 632K est) muted but rate-cut narrative dominates.
Payment processor bounce on fintech rotation; technical breakout from $38-40 base on elevated volume.
Biotech momentum on clinical trial optimism; strong volume breakout above $110 resistance.
Solar sector rebound on lower energy costs and stimulus expectations; RVOL >6x on 51M volume vs 8.4M avg.
Biotech momentum on immune medicine partnership news; breakout above $18 resistance on 2x average volume.

losers.catalyst: AI chip sector broad selloff; NVIDIA sympathy weakness + concerns on AI capex sustainability after semiconductor sector downgrade sentiment.
Semiconductor sector weakness on AI spending concerns; NVTS broke $20 support on heavy volume, 3x average.
Biotech volatility; no specific company news, sharp reversal from recent highs on thin liquidity.
No specific catalyst; broad tech/software small-cap de-risking on rotation out of speculative names.
Gold futures slumped >3% to $4,010/oz on US dollar strength and risk-on sentiment; gold miners dragged lower.

callSetups.rationale: Earnings momentum carry-forward. Record beat + guidance raise; AH +13% ile gap-up open bekleniyor. Pullback'ta $1170 (gap-fill zone) desteğinden CALL. Volume confirmation zorunlu.
Homebuilder sector rotation + technical breakout. $60 psikolojik destek üzerinde kapanış; yükseliş momentumunun devamı için CALL. Volume confirmation.
Small-cap rotation devam ediyor. IWM SPY/QQQ'dan outperformance gösteriyor. $295 VWAP reclaim seviyesi; üzerinde kapanışla CALL. Russell 2000 relative strength.
Floor & Decor %10.65 yükselişle kapanış; home improvement/homebuilder zincirleme etkisi. $55 destek üzerinde CALL. Volume confirmation.
VIX 18.63 normal seviyede; 3-günlük negatif seri sonrası mean reversion bounce potansiyeli. $730 yakın destek; VWAP'a doğru hareket için CALL. Gap fill scenario.

putSetups.rationale: Tech sector weakness (XLK -3.7%) devam ediyor. QQQ VWAP altında kapanış yaptı ($710.62 vs VWAP $711.67). $712 seviyesinden reject ile PUT. Momentum bearish.
AI chip sector broad selloff; Cerebras $20 support kırıldı ve 17.6M hacimle sert düştü. Dead cat bounce'ta $185 reject ile PUT. Trend bearish.
Semiconductor AI spending concerns; NVDA $200 psikolojik direnç altında zayıf. Tech sector weakness devam ederse $190 test edilebilir. Volume confirmation ile PUT.
Apollo Global -6.13% ile S&P 500'un en büyük loser'ı. Financial services sector under pressure. $122 seviyesinden reject ile PUT. Breakdown continuation.
Coinbase crypto/fintech weakness; Bitcoin $59K-61K aralığında zayıf. $150 support kırılırsa $140 hedef. $152 reject ile PUT. High R/R.

earningsCalendar.guidance: Q4 revenue $49B-$51B, adjusted EPS $30-$32; gross margin ~86%. Strong AI/HBM demand outlook.
earningsCalendar.afterMarketReaction: +13% to ~$1,180 in extended trading; stock nears Monday's record high.
earningsCalendar.note: MASSIVE BEAT. Adjusted EPS $25.11 vs $20.20 consensus (+24.3%). Revenue $41.46B vs $35.82B (+15.7%). Record gross margin 84.9%. 0DTE YASAK — IV crush active, but momentum carry-forward candidate for next session.

earningsCalendar.guidance: Q2 2026 net revenue growth +3% to +8% YoY; slower growth expected due to macro/energy pressures.
earningsCalendar.afterMarketReaction: -1.73% to $44.68 in extended trading; muted reaction on EPS miss despite revenue beat.
earningsCalendar.note: EPS miss $0.83 vs $0.85 consensus (-2.35%). Revenue beat $2.35B vs $2.33B. Weak guidance overshadows top-line beat. 0DTE YASAK — IV crush risk.
Q4 FY2026 results reported before market open; actual EPS/revenue not available in searched sources prior to report generation. Crypto miner — Bitcoin volatility direct exposure. 0DTE YASAK.

vwapNotes: SPY kapanış $733.24, VWAP ~$734.68 → VWAP altında kapanış (risk-off). QQQ kapanış $710.62, VWAP ~$711.67 → VWAP altında, tech weakness devam. IWM kapanış $296.69, VWAP ~$297.02 → VWAP hemen altında ama pozitif close (+0.46%), small-cap outperformance. Genel resim: SPY/QQQ VWAP altında = risk-off bias; IWM pozitif = rotation small-cap'lere. Gap-up açılış yapan SPY/QQQ gap fill'i tamamladı ve altına sarktı. Yarın mean reversion bounce veya breakdown devamı izlenecek.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 18.63 (normal-elevated sınırında, -4.41%). 15-20 aralığında = normal volatilite; 20 üzeri kapanışta elevated risk. Şu an complacency sınırında.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech (XLK -3.7%) ve Semiconductor zayıf; AI spending concerns. Consumer Staples (XLP +1.8%) ve Utilities güçlü. Small-cap (IWM +0.46%) large-cap'tan outperform. Rotation real assets / value'ya doğru devam ediyor.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: MU massive beat + record guidance (AH +13%) — semiconductorda sentiment reversal tetikleyebilir. TCOM mixed (EPS miss, guidance weak) — travel sector overhang. MU IV crush risk devam ediyor; yarın momentum carry ama 0DTE tavsiye edilmez.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: Yarın (June 25) 8:30 ET yoğun macro takvim: Initial Jobless Claims, Personal Income/Spending, PCE Deflator (Y/Y 4.1% est), Core PCE (Y/Y 3.4% est), Durable Goods, GDP Revision (Q1 1.7% est). Ayrıca NY Fed President John Williams (3:40 PM) ve Chicago Fed President Austan Goolsbee (6:30 PM) konuşmaları. PCE verisi Fed policy beklentilerini hareketlendirebilir.

nextDayCarryForward.catalyst: Earnings momentum continuation + semiconductor sector sympathy rebound.

nextDayCarryForward.reason: EPS miss ($0.83 vs $0.85) + weak Q2 guidance (3-8% growth) overhang. Revenue beat bile fiyatı kurtaramadı. Bearish carry.
nextDayCarryForward.catalyst: Guidance downgrade continuation; $44.50 altında PUT setup.

nextDayCarryForward.reason: Homebuilder sector rotation + %16.65 yükseliş. Real assets / value trade devam ediyor. Momentum carry.
nextDayCarryForward.catalyst: Housing data / mortgage rate narrative + sector rotation.

Small-cap rotation (IWM +0.46% vs SPY -0.05%, QQQ -0.42%). Russell 2000 relative strength devam ediyor.
